name: image-asset-prompt-sidecars
title: Image asset prompt sidecars and inventory
description: Co-locate final image-generation prompts beside project image assets, update global memory/specs, audit existing assets, and reverse-generate missing prompt sidecars for future high-quality replacement.
creator: lijin
notes: Completed 2026-05-02 and revised per follow-up feedback. Inventory now supports same-directory prompt provenance with <image-stem>.prompt.md for independent images and one expression-set.prompt.md per NPC expression set. The group sidecar keeps only the natural/neutral single-image prompt to avoid five-expression contact-sheet generation, while validation still covers grouped assets, dimensions, hashes, prompt type, Style DNA, and identity locks. Updated AGENTS.md, docs/IMAGE_ASSETS_SPEC.md, frontend image/NPC specs, and image prompt skills with the grouped sidecar rule.

meta.user_request: Put final prompts next to corresponding image assets, update global memory, inventory project images, reverse-generate missing prompts, and record as highest-priority Trellis task first.
meta.prompt_sidecar_convention: Same-directory prompt provenance: independent images use <image-stem>.prompt.md; one character NPC expression sets use expression-set.prompt.md listing assets, expressions, dimensions, hashes, prompt type, Style DNA, and identity locks. ## Final prompt contains only the natural/neutral single-image prompt.
meta.priority_reason: P0 because promptless image assets block reliable future high-quality regeneration/replacement and create provenance/IP/style-drift risk.
done: Defined same-directory prompt provenance schema in global/spec docs, including expression-set.prompt.md for NPC expression sets
Generated prompt sidecars for 211 scanned formal image assets
Backfilled 70 public-welfare batch sprites as original-final from prompt manifests
Marked non-original prompt backfills as reverse-engineered or reference-only
Added task-local inventory/generator/validator scripts and inventory JSON/Markdown
Revised NPC expression sprites from one sidecar per image to one expression-set.prompt.md per character directory

verification.sidecar_validator: passed; 211 scanned image assets, 0 missing sidecars
verification.grouped_expression_sidecars: passed; 28 NPC expression-set sidecars cover 140 public-welfare sprite assets with 0 missing sidecars
